# Example prompts

## Outline-first drafting (default)

- "Run outline_confirm mode, draft the outline, and wait for my approval before drafting sections."
- "Create an outline for a growth strategy deck, map each section to archetypes, then pause for confirmation."
- "Use detailed depth profile and include evidence-plan notes in the outline for each section."

## One-shot bypass

- "Use one_shot mode and generate the full deck now with reasonable assumptions."
- "Bypass outline confirmation and draft deeply in one pass with explicit assumption logging."

## Payload-first section drafting

- "Use `core.swot-analysis` and fill the authoring payload with claims, evidence objects, implications, and decision ask."
- "Use `core.option-tradeoff-comparison` and include weighted evidence and recommendation logic in payload form."

## Finance/deal-depth archetypes

- "Use `finance.pnl-walkthrough` with a dense table evidence object and interpretation bullets."
- "Use `finance.margin-bridge-waterfall` and include chart points plus source anchors in payload."
- "Use `finance.qoe-style-adjustment-walkthrough` and map adjustments to explicit implications."

## Checklist and quality control

- "Run the profile-aware checklist before finalizing sections."
- "Report outline adherence and advisory quality score deltas after compile."
- "Flag sections that miss depth minima for this profile without blocking compile."
